lines: There are no recent results to break down, you lucky bastards, so let's talk about what's in store today — the third-place playoff, aka the match nobody asked for, played by teams who bottled it when it mattered.

France vs England for third place — a graveyard fixture starring the dead teams of four complete fucking wasters: Callum, Croft, Dene, and The Foreman are all pinning their last shred of hope on France, while Carter and Wilmot's England limp in like a dog that got hit by a car but hasn't quite died yet.

Wilmot, sitting third on 87pts with every single one of his teams — England, Morocco, Norway, Saudi Arabia — eliminated, you absolute catastrophe of a sweepstake entry. You picked four teams and watched all four get binned. Third place means absolutely fuck all to you, you're just here to witness the corpse of your England dream get kicked into a ditch one final time.

The Foreman is propping up the bottom half on 56pts with France as his last hope in a third-place nothing-match — this is what rock bottom looks like, pal. France. Third place play-off. That's your legacy.

Watch today for whether France or England can grind out a win — Callum on 87pts needs every scrap to close down Jim at the top, while Carter on 79pts needs a miracle that isn't coming because his entire squad is already in the fucking bin.
